name: Ant Attack
short_description: Ant Attack - A peculiar blend of Clicker and Tower Defense.
detailed_description:
Ant Attack is a game that merges Clicker mechanics with Tower Defense and some elements of Rogue-lite.
Your mission is to defend the piece of bread that has fallen from the table from the ants. To do this, you have to collect as many crumbs as possible in the least amount of time possible and then invest them in increasing your power to face increasingly aggressive waves of ants or improving your efficiency in collecting crumbs.

The game features:

  • 4 acts and 4 bosses, each one more difficult than the last.
  • Over 85 different waves.
  • 48 upgrades.
  • 4 ultimate attacks with exclusive animations.
  • 2 different traps to place on the stage.
  • 13 different enemies.
  • Clicker, Tower Defense, and Rogue-lite mechanics.
  • And many more things to discover.
